# Remake

Remake is the premium iOS skincare and makeup barcode scanning app. It empowers consumers to make healthy, acne-safe decisions by checking cosmetics formulas for toxic, comedogenic, or hidden allergen ingredients with 100% objective consumer trust.

## Core Capabilities

- **Cosmetic Barcode Scanner:** Scan barcodes of makeup, foundation, skincare, or moisturizers to instantly reveal complete chemical ingredient profiles.
- **Acne-Safe Ingredient Checker:** Aggressive, evidence-backed warnings identifying comedogenic ingredients, pore-cloggers, and barrier-disrupting chemicals.
- **Toxic Chemical Filter:** Highlights endocrine disruptors, suspected carcinogens, hidden allergens, and contact irritants.
- **Custom Shade & Surface Analyzer:** Analyzes facial surface features and undertones for optimal foundation and color matching.
- **Objective Ratings:** Strictly objective rating system based on official INCI ingredient lists, with no corporate bias or brand sponsorships.

## App Access & Pricing

Remake operates on a **hard paywall model with zero free tier**. All features, including scanning, database lookups, and shade-matching, require an active premium subscription immediately following initial onboarding.

- **Weekly Access:** $4.99 / week (includes full access, infinite scans, and shade match)
- **Monthly Access:** $14.99 / month (recurring subscription)
- **Annual Membership:** $59.99 / year (highest savings)

All billing and subscription cycles are secured natively through Apple In-App Purchases (IAP) integrated via RevenueCat.

## Pages & Context

- [Waitlist Page](https://remake.beauty/) — Main waitlist page featuring the finalized pink (#D98A96) score ring and signups via Web3Forms.
- [Terms of Service](https://remake.beauty/terms.html) — Legal agreement guidelines.
- [Privacy Policy](https://remake.beauty/privacy.html) — Secure data transmission policies.
